title: OSCORE protect paths memcpy optional buffers without validating length pairs
description: oscore_protect_request() and oscore_protect_response() call memcpy() from options when options_len > 0 and from payload when payload_len > 0, but neither function checks that the corresponding pointer is non-NULL. Trigger: caller supplies payload_len/options_len from decoded CoAP metadata while the pointer is NULL. Bad behavior: NULL dereference in the protect path instead of OSCORE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM. Locations: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:1152-1168 and :1476-1492.
